nasb.text: Moreover, as for me, far be it from me that I should sin against the Lord by ceasing to pray for you; but I will instruct you in the good and right way.

esv.text: Moreover, as for me, far be it from me that I should sin against the Lord by ceasing to pray for you, and I will instruct you in the good and the right way.

cnv.text: 至於我，我決不停止為你們禱告，以致得罪耶和華；我要把善道正路教導你們。

ccb.text: 至于我，我会不断地为你们祈祷，免得我得罪耶和华。我会教导你们行善道、走正路。
